text: Add explicit push/pull workflow for the gittoc branch

Refine scope: prefer a simple config such as gittoc.sync.mode = off | pull | pull-push. The tracking branch itself should stay implicit and not be a normal user concern; remote/branch plumbing should be handled by the tool or the embedding supervisor.

Refine again: keep remote for inspection/configuration, but model actual synchronization as explicit pull <remote> and push <remote> commands. pull should fetch and attempt a normal merge of the hidden tracker branch, failing loudly on conflicts rather than hiding them. Drop sync.mode for now unless a real automation need appears later.
